seoTitle: Nullica vs Numbaa — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nullica and Numbaa. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nullica and Numbaa.
heading: Nullica vs Numbaa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nullica, New South Wales and Numbaa, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nullica has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Numbaa (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nullica or Numbaa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nullica has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Numbaa scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nullica scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Numbaa scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nullica or Numbaa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nullica has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
